Class BachelorStudent

java.lang.Object
users.User
users.Student
users.BachelorStudent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Researcher
public class BachelorStudent extends Student
Represents a bachelor student. A 4th-year bachelor student may be assigned a research supervisor.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • BachelorStudent

      public BachelorStudent(String id, String login, String password, String name, String email, String major, int yearOfStudy)

  • Method Details

    • setSupervisor

      public void setSupervisor(Researcher supervisor) throws LowHIndexException
      Assigns a supervisor to a 4th-year bachelor student.
      Parameters:
      supervisor - the researcher who will supervise the student
      Throws:
      LowHIndexException - if supervisor h-index is less than 3
      IllegalStateException - if the student is not on the 4th year

    • getSupervisor

      public Researcher getSupervisor()
